title: [WIP] Latent LM with TurboQuant 3-bit Quantization
author: Elarwei001

data.description: Encoder and decoder weights are tied to save parameters.
Latent language model with token encoder, latent predictor, and decoder operating in latent space.
LeWM-style latent prediction with encoder-to-latent projection, latent-space transformer predictor, and decoder back to logits.

novel_contributions: Combines LeWM-style latent prediction with TurboQuant 3-bit quantization
Uses a latent-space predictor architecture instead of token-space prediction
Applies tied encoder/decoder weights to reduce parameter count
Introduces SIGReg as a latent regularizer in the training objective
Targets a larger effective parameter budget within the 16MB artifact limit
